name: Tamara's 7th Birthday Sofia Cake
description: Tall pink vanilla sponge cake featuring edible character decals, a cardstock castle topper, and delicate purple sugar pearls.

name: Mother's Day Mint & Pink Cake
description: Mint green ridged buttercream cake topped with pink frosting swirls, multicolored sprinkles, and a custom 'Happy Mother's Day' topper.

name: Jael's Sofia Birthday Cake
description: Lavender ridged buttercream cake decorated with Sofia the First toppers, rainbow sprinkles, and hand-piped base borders.

name: Coconut & Pineapple Birthday Cake
description: Tropical sponge cake covered in shredded coconut, topped with pink buttercream swirls, glazed pineapple pieces, and a pink 'Happy Birthday' topper.

name: White Forest Pineapple Rose Cake
description: White forest cake coated in coconut flakes, featuring cream rosettes, blue sprinkles, and a centered glazed pineapple ring.

name: Eid Mubarak Fresh Fruit Cake
description: Celebration cake covered in coconut flakes, topped with fresh strawberry halves, dark grapes, and silver leaf accents.

name: Dylan's 1st Birthday Butterfly Cake
description: Soft yellow buttercream cake with colorful base sprinkles, topped with a yellow butterfly and custom 'Dylan is One' lettering.

name: Pink Gold Leaf Milestone Cake
description: Elegant pink buttercream cake accented with real gold leaf flakes and a base border of dark pink sugar crystals.

name: Paw Patrol Road Trip Cake
description: Adventure-themed cake with a black 'road' fondant base, green grass piping, and Paw Patrol character toppers.

name: Akim's 8th Larva Island Cake
description: Light blue buttercream cake featuring Larva character decals, palm tree toppers, and a vibrant sprinkle base.
